title: sciodaphyllum recaldeorum
intro: Sciodaphyllum recaldeorum, also known as the Antioquian umbrella tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lauraceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Sciodaphyllum recaldeorum include reducing fever, relieving respiratory problems, and treating gastrointestinal issues. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves are often used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are then used to harness its medicinal properties.
